words.def: not in accordance with the fact or reality or actuality
words.zh: a. 錯誤的, 虛偽的, 假的, 不老實的

words.def: your consciousness of your own identity
words.zh: n. 自己, 自我, 本性, 本質, 私心, 本人
n. 出售, 賣, 拍賣, 銷售額, 廉價出售

words.def: strongbox where valuables can be safely kept
words.zh: n. 保險箱, 冷藏室

words.def: a division of an ocean or a large body of salt water partially enclosed by land
words.zh: n. 海, 海洋, 海浪, 大量
